title: Integrate M4 core vertical slice scenario
summary: Compose the focused M4 dusk-to-dawn borrowed-shadow lamp scenario with deterministic headless evidence, hashes and structured explanations.
acceptance: Headless scenario m4-core-vertical-slice runs the borrowed-shadow lamp rule-discovery path with recorded seed scenario id content hash command hash final world hash and read-model hash
Scenario evidence shows the rule can be inferred before irreversible harm through lamp traces Chronicle evidence obligation state and town-rule decisions
Prevention failure and non-combat containment paths emit structured ReasonTrace and dawn-review source rows
M0-M3 baseline invariants remain protected including no M4 fix that weakens M3 ordinary-life behavior
No save/replay Worker parity benchmark baseline update public protocol schema dependency UI authority or M5 content is included

history.details: Created by WM-0061 M4 planning DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.

objective: Compose the first playable M4 rule-discovery path after the focused owner surfaces are reviewed.
forbiddenPaths: public save format or schema changes
broad anomaly roster faction campaign season event pool content catalog or product UI implementation
global scan unversioned cache or director-authority workaround
benchmarkImpact: Produces scenario metrics and artifacts for downstream save/replay Worker and benchmark tasks without updating baselines.
reviewRouting: Simulation-engineer completes to reviewer; systems-architect must be consulted if integration reveals owner gaps or public contract needs.
rollbackModel: Revert M4 scenario composition, artifacts, tests and docs; keep focused owner stores available only if independently reviewed and useful.
ownerGate: Do not repair upstream owner-store design inside scenario glue
Record hashes and structured evidence for both prevention and failure paths
Block on save protocol schema dependency UI authority M5 or benchmark-threshold changes

sparkEligibility.reason: Integrated deterministic scenario composition crosses multiple M4 owner surfaces and is not suitable for Spark.
